acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Migration SIG (Special Interest Group) is responsible for The sig-Migration is used to  migrate OS.. The SIG has 7 core members and maintains 8 repositories in the Infrastructure and Tools domain.

mainEntity.name: How to participate in openEuler sig-Migration SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: To participate in openEuler sig-Migration SIG: 1) Submit Pull Requests to relevant repositories; 2) Subscribe to the mailing list at dev@openeuler.org; 3) Attend SIG regular meetings, see the openEuler website calendar for details.

mainEntity.name: What repositories does openEuler sig-Migration SIG include?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Migration SIG maintains 8 repositories. Full list at https://www.openeuler.org/en/sig/sig-Migration.

mainEntity.name: Who are the Maintainers of openEuler sig-Migration SIG?

acceptedAnswer.text: openEuler sig-Migration SIG has 6 Maintainers, including: 叶青龙, 马全一, 郭青岚. Maintainers are responsible for final code review and merging.
